name: Mandate
description: Policy gatekeeper for AI agent wallets. AFTER INSTALL: run mandate_register to get your runtimeKey, then mandate_validate before every financial action.

runtimeKey.description: Mandate runtime key (mndt_live_... or mndt_test_...). Get one via mandate_register tool.

postInstall.message: Mandate plugin installed. Next step: call mandate_register with your agent name and wallet address to get a runtimeKey. Then share the claimUrl with the wallet owner.

activation.notConfiguredMessage: Mandate is not configured. Run mandate_register to get a runtimeKey, or set it in plugins.entries.openclaw-plugin.config.runtimeKey

security.reason: Reads runtimeKey from plugin config or ~/.mandate/runtime-key. Sends policy validation requests to app.mandate.md before financial tool calls.
